name: SignalChatResourceLike
description: Minimal structural contract required to adapt a signal-backed chat resource.

properties.name: isLoading
properties.description: Whether the resource is currently producing a response.

properties.name: reload
properties.description: Reload the resource, used as a fallback for `Agent.regenerate()`.

properties.name: resendMessages
properties.description: Re-run against the current history, if supported by the resource.

properties.name: setMessages
properties.description: Replace resource message history. Used by `Agent.regenerate()`.

properties.name: stop
properties.description: Stop the current response. Called only while `isLoading()` is true.

name: SignalChatResourceToolCall
description: Tool-call shape exposed by a signal-backed chat resource.

properties.name: name
properties.description: Tool name shown in Threadplane tool-call UI.

properties.name: result
properties.description: Settled tool result, when the resource exposes one.

properties.name: status
properties.description: Resource-specific lifecycle state for the tool call.

properties.name: toolCallId
properties.description: Stable identifier for linking assistant messages to tool-call details.

name: SignalChatResourceMessage
description: Message shape consumed by the signal-resource adapter.

name: SignalResourceAgentSource
description: Resource instance or factory accepted by `provideAgent()`.

name: injectAgent
description: Injects the signal-resource-backed Agent registered by provideAgent().

name: provideAgent
description: Provides a signal-resource-backed Agent through Angular dependency injection.

name: toAgent
description: Wrap a signal-backed chat resource in the runtime-neutral Agent contract.
